# Feature Specification: Example Task Manager

## Summary
A small web task manager where users create, list and complete tasks.

## Requirements
- FR-001: Users MUST be able to create a task with a title.
- FR-002: Users MUST be able to mark a task complete.
- FR-003: The system MUST persist tasks between sessions.

## Success Criteria
- SC-001: A user can create and complete a task in under 10 seconds.
